zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stourton於大約1334年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親William de Stourton46歲，母親Joan Vernon37歲。他於大約1370年與Lettice 'unknown'結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1380年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stourton was born about 1334, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Stourton, was 46 and his mother, Joan Vernon, was 37. He married Lettice 'unknown' about 1370. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1380, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stourton est né environ 1334, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Stourton, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan Vernon, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lettice 'unknown' environ 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1380, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stourton(이)가 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stourton(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Vernon(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 Lettice 'unknown'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lettice 'unknown' aproximadamente 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stourton родился около 1334 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Stourton было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Vernon, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lettice 'unknown' около 1370 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1380 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
